issue.summary: 1. Valid email and strong password required2. Email must be unique3. Password policy enforced4. Verification email sent5. Account active only after verification6. Invalid inputs show error
issue.description: User should be able to create account using email and password

attachments.content:
Sample Requirement Document
 Project: Jira Attachment Reader
Requirement ID: REQ-1001
User Story: As a user, I want to upload PDF attachments so that the system extracts readable text.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. PDF contains embedded selectable text.
2. Text can be searched using Ctrl+F.
3. PDF is generated from Word, not from a scanner.
